narrative:
Columbia Twp. township has 3,417 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.1 percentage points.
